name: Company Simulator
description:
You have just been accepted into the Worldwide OmniCorp Organization. An organization with some of the most successful businesses in the world. Your goal is to create and grow a successful business of your own while trying to stay in the Worldwide OmniCorp Organization. Do you have what it takes to grow a successful business?

Note: This is my first ever bot on janitor, so if there’s any errors please let me know
